# Solutions {.unnumbered}

{{< include sol_io_and_scripts.qmd >}}

{{< include sol_conditional_statements.qmd >}}

{{< include sol_for_and_while_loops.qmd >}}

{{< include sol_lists.qmd >}}

{{< include sol_turtle.qmd >}}

{{< include sol_sequences_and_operations.qmd >}}

{{< include sol_numpy_arrays.qmd >}}

{{< include sol_matplotlib.qmd >}}

{{< include sol_functions.qmd >}}
